name: How does workers comp work for slip and fall at my job?

mainEntity.name: How does workers comp work for slip and fall at my job?

acceptedAnswer.text: Employer reports to insurer; you get med bills paid, partial wages—file ASAP.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Workers' compensation provides medical treatment, wage replacement, and disability benefits for work-related slip and falls without proving fault.** In Utah and Idaho, employers must carry this insurance for employee injuries.[1] Key factors: (1) Report injury quickly; (2) Employer files claim with insurer; (3) You attend approved medical care; (4) Temporary benefits up to 72% of wages. Disputes go to an administrative hearing. Hire an attorney if denied or underrated.

description: Employer reports to insurer; you get med bills paid, partial wages—file ASAP.
